title: How to Sell Your Mountain Home in the High Country
excerpt: Selling a mountain home in the High Country takes more than a sign in the yard — it takes local knowledge, smart pricing, and the right timing. Here's what every seller in Boone, Blowing Rock, and the surrounding High Country should know before they list.
image_alt: Aerial view of a mountain home for sale in the High Country near Boone NC in spring
